name: Hawkeye Systems, Inc.
business: Hawkeye Systems, Inc. had no operating revenues for fiscal years 2025 and 2024 after ceasing operations of its PPE business in July 2021. The company generated other income from consulting fees related to CNTNR, with $0 in 2025 and $45,000 in 2024. The company is in the development stage and has accumulated losses since inception.
